title: Implement Learning Loop MVP: Outcome Ledger + Prompt Variant Attribution
context:
Design is complete and approved at docs/learning-loop-mvp-design.md. Previous consolidated handoff (learning-mvp-consolidated.json) was based on an older 4-phase design. This handoff replaces it with a cleaner 8-step MVP scope.

What already exists:
- TaskOutcome model at app/models.py:846
- OutcomeLearning model at app/models.py:866
- task_outcomes and outcome_learnings tables (created)
- PromptEnhancer stub at app/orchestrator/prompt_enhancer.py
- Personal learning router at app/routers/learning.py (DO NOT touch — different system)

What's missing and must be built (in this order):
1. app/orchestrator/outcome_tracker.py — OutcomeTracker service
2. Hook outcome tracking into worker.py after task completion
3. app/routers/agent_learning.py — POST /api/agent-learning/outcomes + GET /api/agent-learning/summary
4. Register new router in app/main.py (prefix /api/agent-learning)
5. Hook prompt enhancement into worker.py before task spawn
6. app/orchestrator/learning_batch.py — Daily batch job
7. Engine timer integration in app/orchestrator/engine.py (2am ET, same pattern as memory_maintenance)
8. PATCH /api/agent-learning/learnings/{id} approval endpoint

Stop after step 4 if time-boxed. Steps 1-4 give a working ledger + read surface.
acceptance: app/orchestrator/outcome_tracker.py exists with OutcomeTracker.track_completion() and OutcomeTracker.record_feedback() — both fail-safe (no exceptions propagate to worker)
worker.py calls OutcomeTracker.track_completion() in _handle_worker_completion() after task status update
app/routers/agent_learning.py exists with POST /api/agent-learning/outcomes and GET /api/agent-learning/summary
New router mounted in app/main.py at prefix /api/agent-learning (separate from /api/learning which is personal plans)
POST /api/agent-learning/outcomes accepts {task_id, outcome, reason_tags, feedback} and upserts a TaskOutcome row
GET /api/agent-learning/summary returns {total_outcomes, success_rate, by_agent, learning_impact, top_failure_patterns} with since_days/agent_type/task_category query params
LEARNING_ENABLED env flag disables all learning code (master switch)
worker.py calls PromptEnhancer.enhance_prompt() before spawn; 20% of runs get learning_disabled=True (control group)
app/orchestrator/learning_batch.py exists — queries last 14 days of failures, groups by agent_type + pattern_name, writes OutcomeLearning rows with is_active=False for patterns with >=3 failures
Batch job integrated into engine.py timer at 2am ET; last run date persisted to OrchestratorSetting
PATCH /api/agent-learning/learnings/{id} accepts {action: approve|reject|edit, lesson_text?} — approve sets is_active=True and confidence=0.5

tests/test_agent_learning.py covers: track_completion writes row, track_completion never raises, feedback updates outcome, POST /outcomes upserts, GET /summary returns valid stats, GET /summary.learning_impact has both A/B groups, batch creates suggested learnings, batch skips already-covered patterns

key_implementation_details.context_hash: SHA256(agent_type + ':' + task_category + ':' + title_first_8_words_lowercase). Groups similar tasks for A/B comparison.
key_implementation_details.success_detection: success=True if task.work_state=='completed' AND review_state not in ('rejected','failed'). Failure if work_state in ('failed','cancelled') OR review_state in ('rejected','failed') OR error_message is set.
key_implementation_details.ab_split: random.random() < float(os.getenv('LEARNING_CONTROL_GROUP_PCT', '0.2')) → learning_disabled=True, skip PromptEnhancer. Store learning_disabled flag in TaskOutcome so learning_impact in summary can compare groups.
key_implementation_details.api_prefix: New router uses prefix /api/agent-learning (NOT /api/learning — that prefix belongs to personal learning plans)
key_implementation_details.batch_timer: Same pattern as _memory_maintenance_hour in engine.py. Add _learning_batch_hour_et=2 and _last_learning_batch_date_et. Persist last run to OrchestratorSetting key 'last_learning_batch_date_et'.
key_implementation_details.reason_tags: Standard tags: missing_tests, missing_error_handling, unclear_names, missing_docs, missing_validation, wrong_approach, incomplete, scope_creep, hallucinated_api

do_not_touch: app/routers/learning.py — personal learning plans, different system
app/models.py — TaskOutcome and OutcomeLearning already correct, no changes needed
notes: The existing prompt_enhancer.py already has an enhance_prompt() stub. Review it before writing from scratch — may only need minor completion. The batch job should post a chat message on completion (see BriefService or ChatService patterns in the codebase for how to post to chat).
